{
  "analysis": "Let me verify the f_function values for the specific inputs used in the attack.",
  "plan": "Compute the specific f_function values to verify the derivation.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/app')
from feal import f_function, getleft, getright, merge

# Values from the test
k5 = 0x41d02297
k4 = 0x68d473f8

C_a = 0x5ee2b10493b7534c
C_b = 0x1286809182cdaeff

left_a = 0x00000000
left_b = 0x12345678
right_a = 0x00000000
right_b = 0x12345678

gl_a = getleft(C_a)  # 0x5ee2b104
gl_b = getleft(C_b)  # 0x12868091

R3_a = getright(C_a) ^ getleft(C_a)  # 0xcd55e248
R3_b = getright(C_b) ^ getleft(C_b)  # 0x904b2e6e

print(f'gl_a = {hex(gl_a)}')
print(f'gl_b = {hex(gl_b)}')
print(f'R3_a = {hex(R3_a)}')
print(f'R3_b = {hex(R3_b)}')
print()

# Compute f(R3_a ^ k5)
f1 = f_function(R3_a ^ k5)
print(f'f(R3_a ^ k5) = f({hex(R3_a ^ k5)}) = {hex(f1)}')

# Compute L3_a
L3_a = gl_a ^ f1
print(f'L3_a = gl_a ^ f1 = {hex(L3_a)}')

# Compute f(R3_b ^ k5)
f2 = f_function(R3_b ^ k5)
print(f'f(R3_b ^ k5) = f({hex(R3_b ^ k5)}) = {hex(f2)}')

# Compute L3_b
L3_b = gl_b ^ f2
print(f'L3_b = gl_b ^ f2 = {hex(L3_b)}')
print()

# Compute T
delta = left_a ^ left_b
T = R3_a ^ R3_b ^ delta
print(f'delta = {hex(delta)}')
print(f'T = R3_a ^ R3_b ^ delta = {hex(T)}')
print()

# Check if f(L3_a ^ k4) ^ f(L3_b ^ k4) == T
lhs = f_function(L3_a ^ k4) ^ f_function(L3_b ^ k4)
print(f'f(L3_a ^ k4) ^ f(L3_b ^ k4) = {hex(lhs)}')
print(f'Expected (T): {hex(T)}')
print(f'Match: {lhs == T}')
"
